essence: David requests a multi-agent architectural analysis of the Autoclawed codebase covering its three parts (Electron Kanban board, multi-Claude-instance spawning, RAG memory), judging complexity, RAG quality, and how Claude terminals are spawned, since the app looks good but is heavy and buggy.

actions.text: Analyze Autoclawed codebase and produce complexity + RAG-quality + Claude-spawning analysis report

essence: During OMI onboarding Q&A David states his profile — 53, Chiang Mai, YouTube content creator — and his monthly goals: build software with vibe coding and produce multiple videos.

David unboxes his OMI wearable (magnetic-latch box, charging base, neckband, quick-start guide) — the origin event of his always-on voice-capture pipeline — and answers onboarding questions as a Chiang Mai-based YouTube content creator.
